name: Geetha Subramanyam
overview: Geetha Subramanyam is a Telugu web series that explores the Tom and Jerry kind of couple in a live-in relationship; the story is all about how they realize that they are actually made for each other with their silly fights for serious things and serious fights for ridiculous things. Exploring the various situations that go on in every household in a funny, slice-of-life kind of way.

trailers.title: Geetha Subramanyam Season 3 | TRAILER| Abhignya Vuthaluru , Supraj Ranga | ahavideoIN
